case_title: BLADYS AMAYA VS. HY CHUNG LAM ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND FEES. (TRANSACTION ID # 100134021)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-02-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. THE NOV-03-2020 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-10-2020 CONTINUED TO JUL-22-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-01-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-22-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100109634), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMAYA, BLADYS SERVED JUL-26-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JUL-28-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, HY CHUNG
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR DEC-28-2020. THE DEC-02-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-01-2020 CONTINUED TO NOV-03-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100109937) FILED BY DEFENDANT LAM, HY CHUNG
ARBITRATOR JOHN A KOEPPEL APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JAN-15-2021 THROUGH APR-15-2021.
NOTICE OF CHANGE IN HANDLING ATTORNEY (TRANSACTION ID # 100127194) FILED BY DEFENDANT LAM, HY CHUNG

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMAYA, BLADYS AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, HY CHUNG DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-10-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-06-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-18-2020
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JAN-14-2021.
